title: 2020 Press Releases
summary: This is a listing/index page aggregating all Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2020. It contains links to hundreds of distinct press releases spanning diverse topics including monetary policy decisions, enforcement actions, banking regulation, stress tests, and program extensions. This is not a single coherent document suitable for detailed analysis.
key_points: This is a listing page, not an archiveable single document
Contains links to press releases from throughout 2020 (December through October)
Topics include: Main Street Lending Program extensions, CCyB decisions, stress test results, LIBOR transition guidance, enforcement actions, and various banking applications
Individual press releases would need to be archived separately as distinct documents
why_it_matters: This source cannot be meaningfully archived as a research note. Individual press releases from 2020 would each constitute separate, potentially relevant documents for macro catalyst or market structure research.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page per source_type, violating Rule 5 which mandates rejection of listing pages
Source contains no single coherent document - only links to hundreds of individual press releases
event_type set to 'unknown' which is correct for a listing page, but this confirms the source lacks the specificity needed for archival
Source cannot meaningfully support any individual research record as it is merely an index
Historical age (2020 data is ~6 years stale from TODAY 2026-03-31) further reduces archival value

notes: PAGE_TYPE is listing_page. This is an index page that cannot be archived as a single research note. The source contains references to macro-relevant items (e.g., Main Street Lending Program extensions, CCyB decisions, swap line extensions, stress test results) but these are individual documents that should be crawled and archived separately. Historical record: 2020 data is approximately 6 years stale from TODAY (2026-03-31).
